data.title: SpaceX Tests Starship Booster Ahead Of Next Flight: Will The 7th Test Happen Before End Of 2024?
data.description: SpaceX is preparing for another test flight of its Starship launch vehicle, possibly before the end of the year. The company has moved the booster to the launch pad for testing and has conducted six test flights so far.

data.title: Apple Working On In-House Modems To Replace Qualcomm, Will Slim Down iPhones Further And Bring Cellular Connectivity To Macs: Report
data.description: Apple is developing its own modem technology, aiming to replace Qualcomm components and enable slimmer iPhones, foldable devices, and cellular connectivity for Macs and headsets, potentially reshaping its product lineup by 2026.

data.title: Tesla To Rely On Pre-Assembled Superchargers To Keep Up Deployment In Nordic Winters, Says Exec
data.description: EV giant Tesla will rely on pre-assembled superchargers in the Nordic countries including Norway to keep up the pace of deployment in the freezing temperatures, senior company executive Max de Zegher said on Thursday.

data.title: Why Kentucky Is Keeping Marijuana Applicants' Names A Secret
data.description: Kentucky withholds medical marijuana applicant names, sparking transparency concerns and legal challenges over out-of-state influence.

data.title: If You Invested $1,000 In Bitcoin When Trump Said US Will Be 'Crypto Capital Of The World,' Here's How Much You'd Have Today
